seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani 3-Day Sembalun Trek — Summit, Lake & Hot Spring | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: Trek Mount Rinjani in 3 days via the Sembalun route — summit at 3,726 m, descend to Segara Anak lake, and soak in volcanic hot springs. Certified guides & full support included.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani 3-Day Sembalun Trek — Summit, Lake & Hot Spring
hero.desc: Go2Rinjani's most popular package — the 3-day Sembalun summit lake trek combines the full Mount Rinjani experience in three days: summit push to 3,726 m, descent to the sacred shores of Segara Anak lake, and a soak in Rinjani's volcanic hot springs. All fully supported by certified local guides, porters, and permits.

intro.label: 3 Days 2 Nights — Sembalun Route
intro.title: The Complete Mount Rinjani Experience — Summit, Lake & Hot Spring
intro.desc: The 3-day Sembalun route is the most complete Mount Rinjani trek for trekkers who want it all — without spending four days on the mountain. Starting from Sembalun valley at 1,156 m, the route climbs through open savannah landscapes to Plawangan Sembalun crater rim (2,639 m), pushes to the summit at 3,726 m, then descends into the sacred crater to camp beside Segara Anak lake and soak in the volcanic hot springs at its shore. Optional Torean Route descent available for trekkers who want a different trail on the way out.

highlights.section_title: What to Expect on This Trek

items.title: Sembalun Savannah Trail
items.desc: The trek begins across the open savannah landscapes of Sembalun valley on the eastern slopes of Mount Rinjani National Park — wide, dramatic terrain shaped by traditional Sasak farmland and volcanic activity.

items.title: Mount Rinjani Summit at 3,726 m
items.desc: Pre-dawn summit push from Plawangan Sembalun crater rim to the summit of Mount Rinjani at 3,726 m — Lombok's highest peak and Indonesia's second-highest volcano — arriving at the top for sunrise above the clouds.

items.title: Descent to Segara Anak Lake
items.desc: After the summit, descend into Mount Rinjani's sacred crater and camp beside Segara Anak lake — a turquoise volcanic lake at 2,008 m, revered in both Sasak and Balinese tradition as a place of spiritual significance.

items.title: Volcanic Hot Springs
items.desc: Soak in the natural volcanic hot springs on the shores of Segara Anak lake — a well-earned reward after the summit push, and one of the most memorable experiences on any Mount Rinjani trek.

items.title: Optional Torean Route Descent
items.desc: Trekkers who want a different trail on the way out can opt for the Torean Route descent — a scenic valley trail from Segara Anak lake to Torean village on the northern slopes of Rinjani National Park.

itinerary.intro: Three days, two nights on Mount Rinjani — summit, crater lake, hot springs, and the option to exit via the scenic Torean Route.

days.title: Sembalun Trailhead to Plawangan Sembalun Crater Rim
days.desc: After breakfast and pre-trek briefing at your accommodation in Sembalun, Go2Rinjani transfers you to the Sembalun trailhead (1,156 m). Trek through open savannah landscapes and three rest posts before arriving at Plawangan Sembalun crater rim (2,639 m) by late afternoon. Dinner and overnight camping at the crater rim with views over Segara Anak lake.
highlights: Arrive Plawangan Sembalun crater rim (2,639 m)
Sunset over Segara Anak lake from crater rim
Dinner & overnight camp at Plawangan Sembalun

days.title: Summit Push — Descent to Segara Anak Lake
days.desc: Pre-dawn departure from Plawangan Sembalun for the summit push to 3,726 m — arriving at the top of Mount Rinjani for sunrise. After the summit, descend back to Plawangan Sembalun for breakfast, then continue the descent into the crater to Segara Anak lake (2,008 m). Camp beside the lake and soak in the volcanic hot springs at the crater floor.
highlights: Pre-dawn summit push from Plawangan Sembalun (2,639 m)
Arrive Mount Rinjani summit (3,726 m) at sunrise
Panoramic views over Lombok, Bali & Sumbawa
Descend to Plawangan Sembalun — breakfast at camp
Descent into crater to Segara Anak lake (2,008 m)
Volcanic hot spring soak at the crater floor
Dinner & overnight camp beside Segara Anak lake

days.title: Segara Anak Lake — Ascent & Descent to Sembalun (or Torean)
days.desc: Wake to sunrise over Segara Anak lake before beginning the ascent back to Plawangan Sembalun crater rim and the full descent to the Sembalun trailhead. Trekkers who opted for the Torean Route will descend via the scenic Torean valley trail to Torean village instead. Transfer back to accommodation after completing the trek.
highlights: Ascent from Segara Anak lake to Plawangan Sembalun
OR: Torean Route descent to Torean village (optional)

inclusions.intro: Every 3-day Mount Rinjani sembalun summit lake trek with Go2Rinjani is fully supported — here is exactly what is included.
included: Porter (personal camp equipment up to 25 kg)
Mount Rinjani National Park entrance permit
All meals on the mountain (3x daily) + hot drinks + mineral water
Full camping equipment: tent, sleeping bag, mattress, pillow, cooking gear
Hotel pickup and drop-off (Sembalun, Senaru, Mataram, Airport, Senggigi)
Torean Route exit option (on request at time of booking)
excluded: Personal trekking gear (jacket, trekking shoes, trekking poles, daypack)
Tips for guides and porters (appreciated but not mandatory)
